
Access Analysis Report
==============================================================

Query: can "app_role" perform s3:DeleteObject on "my_bucket"?
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Layer 1 — Deny Evaluation:             DENY
  Layer 2 — RCP:                         PASS
  Layer 3 — SCP:                         PASS
  Layer 4 — Resource Policy:             PASS
  Layer 5 — Identity Policy:             PASS
  Layer 6 — Permission Boundary:         PASS
  Layer 7 — Session Policy:              PASS

  Result: DENY at Layer 1
